lessons.title: Straight-Beam Examination: Parameters and Test Standards
objectives: Select transducer, frequency, and scan pattern per a written straight-beam procedure
Apply the test standards and acceptance references called out in the procedure
Set scanning sensitivity and coverage for laminar discontinuity detection

lessons.title: Straight-Beam Examination: Evaluating Results and Reporting
objectives: Evaluate straight-beam indications against procedure recording criteria
Document indication location, amplitude, and extent on a test report
Complete a straight-beam test report with all required entries

lessons.title: Angle-Beam Examination: Parameters and Test Standards
objectives: Select wedge angle, frequency, and scanning pattern per a written angle-beam procedure
Standardize distance and sensitivity using the specified test standards
Plan scan coverage using skip distance for full-volume examination

lessons.title: Angle-Beam Examination: Evaluating Results and Reporting
objectives: Plot reflector position from sound-path, surface-distance, and depth data
Evaluate angle-beam indications against procedure recording criteria
Complete an angle-beam test report including plotting sketches
